nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
## Model links

**Workflow**
- [Wan 2.2 SVI 2 Pro](https://huggingface.co/AtelierDarren/SVI_2_pro/tree/main)

**Diffusion model/GUFF**

- [Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-Q4_K_S.gguf high low noise](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-GGUF/tree/main)



**LoRA**

- [wan2.2_i2v_A14b_high and low_noise_lora_rank64_lightx2v_4step_1022.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Wan2.2-Distill-Loras/tree/main)

- [SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_HIGH_lora_rank_128_fp16s](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/tree/dfd86c27ecd09c657b194db14826e77f22c97476/LoRAs/Stable-Video-Infinity/v2.0)


**Text_encoders**

- [umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)

**VAE**

- [wan_2.1_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/tree/main/split_files/vae)

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_Q4_K_S.gguf
│   │   └── wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_Q4_K_S.gguf
│   ├── 📂 loras/
|   |   └── wan2.2_i2v_A14b_low_noise_lora_rank64_lightx2v_4step_1022.safetensors
|   |   └── wan2.2_i2v_A14b_high_noise_lora_rank64_lightx2v_4step_1022.safetensors
|   |   └── SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_HIGH_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors
|   |   └── SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_LOW_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── wan_2.1_vae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
        └── umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors

```

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A continuous, seamless camera shot where time is completely frozen. The camera starts at a low angle  as she sits perfectly motionless on the bed. It then slowly tilts downwards, gliding over the unchanging curves of the glossy latex bodysuit and legs, finally resolving into a static close-up of her feet, highlighting the black suede platform heels and the gathered fabric at her ankles.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A man stands clearly visible in the frame.
He moves calmly toward the right side of the frame and exits the camera view.
The camera remains completely static and does not move.
After a brief pause, the man re-enters the frame from the same right side.
He walks back to the exact same position where he originally stood.
He stops and settles naturally into place.
Movement is smooth, controlled, and realistic.
Lighting, environment, and framing remain unchanged throughout.
High-quality cinematic video, stable composition, clear spatial continuity.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: She looks down at her hands. Slowly, she lifts both hands to chest level, spreading her fingers as she rotates her wrists, turning her palms upward. She studies them closely, shifting her gaze from her left hand to her right, observing every detail with quiet amazement. Then she softly says, “Look at my hands—they are so big!”

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
She is locking down directly to the camera. Her expression softens into  smile—teasing.
The camera descent vertical, gradually tilting upward into a ultra  low-angle perspective, worms-eye near her knees, finaliny presenting a low-angle view close to her knees  while keeping her full figure head to toe inside the frame scene. She  leans forward, locking down directly with the camera.
